goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should 'include free wifi' and should have 'a star of 1'.
The hotel should be in the 'cheap' price range.
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has 'a star of 4'.
Make sure you get 'area' and 'whether they have free parking'.
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'west'.
Make sure you get 'address' and 'attraction type'.
You also want to book a 'taxi' to commute between the two places.
You want to leave the 'hotel' by '20:30'.
Make sure you get 'contact number' and 'car type'.Remember. You don't want booking for accomodation. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for a place to stay. The hotel should include free wifi and should have a star of 1
The hotel should be in the cheap price range
If there is no such hotel, how about one that has a star of 4
Make sure you get area and whether they have free parking
You are also looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the west
Make sure you get address and attraction type
You also want to book a taxi to commute between the two places
You want to leave the hotel by 20:30
Make sure you get contact number and car type
